title: SpamTotems
description: Ever wanted Spamton from Deltarune in your inventory?! No?!?! Well, now you do!! Enjoy!!
body:
Replaces the Totem of Undying texture and name with Spamton and the "pop" sound with his theme!
Comes in two types: Animated and Static. Might make a dancing one later :). Minecraft might label it as "broken or incompatible", this doesn't really mean anything and it'll still work fine.
All sprites ripped from Deltarune chapter 2 by Toby Fox.
I don't own these sprites, I don't own Undertale or Deltarune, I'm not affiliated with Toby Fox or his team. Please don't sue me.

![HeartShapedObject](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f186d18a881602e4dac89fcca8b6f9502860e8ae.gif)
